scripts.build: npm run build:host && npm run build:webview
scripts.build:test: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist/test', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.host.json --outDir dist/test
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:test && node --test dist/test/host/*.test.js dist/test/shared/*.test.js && npm run smoke:pack
scripts.pack: npm run build && node ../run-repository-kun-cli.mjs extension pack .
